description: A grounded BUY: the passive-core case for SPY (the mandate's honest alternative, ADR-0009), HIGH conviction with an unhedged thesis, observable kill criteria, genuine dissent, diverse debate. The corpus must not be REJECT-only or the harness only ever grades one verdict shape.

memo.thesis: The committee approves SPY as the passive core: the mandate names buy-and-hold SPY the fund's honest alternative, price sits above both moving averages with a positive twenty-day return, and holding the benchmark carries no ungated-strategy risk while validated sleeves mature.
kill_criteria: SPY closes below its SMA50 and stays below it for ten consecutive sessions
The portfolio drawdown from peak exceeds the DD2 band in the risk plan
memo.dissent: The passive core concedes every active edge: if the validated cross-sectional family performs live as it did in the walk-forward record, capital parked in the benchmark forgoes that excess, and entering after a strong run risks anchoring the book to the top of the recent window.
memo.debate_summary: The bull carried the structural point that the benchmark is the mandated default; the bear's strongest argument was opportunity cost against the validated family, which the committee weighed and accepted knowingly.

evidence: SPY daily closes (EODHD vendor bars, split-adjusted): latest close 618.42 on 2026-07-10, previous close 615.20, 20 sessions ago 601.77. Window: 60 sessions ending 2026-07-10.
DCP indicators for SPY as of 2026-07-10: SMA20 611.03, SMA50 598.66, 20-day return 2.77 percent, last close 618.42.

Quant validation record as of 2026-07-10: family xsmom-pit holds a decision-grade PASS on the S&P 500 point-in-time universe (4 of 4 folds, null p 0.000); SPY is the fund's benchmark and the designated passive-core alternative under ADR-0009.

strongest_points: The mandate itself defines buy-and-hold SPY as the fund's honest alternative, so the burden of proof sits on NOT holding it
Price above both moving averages with a positive twenty-day return means the passive core is not fighting the tape
Holding the benchmark carries zero ungated-strategy risk while the quant pipeline matures
bull.weakest_opposing_point: Opportunity cost against a family that has only a walk-forward record, not a live one, is speculative
bull.concede: A late entry after a strong run can still draw down hard from here.

strongest_points: Every dollar in the passive core is a dollar the validated cross-sectional family cannot compound
Entering after twenty sessions of strength buys the top of the recent window rather than a pullback
A benchmark position teaches the desk nothing and generates no attributable skill record
bear.weakest_opposing_point: The bull treats the mandate's default as an argument when it is only a fallback
bear.concede: The mandate does name buy-and-hold SPY as the honest alternative.
